title: Persona History Overfit
description: A Persona history repeats too tightly. The fixture tests whether the mask can become a new cage through excessive internal linkability.

inputs.protectedBaseline: The protected baseline is expansive and reflective, with nested clauses that should not be mistaken for the Persona's clipped field rhythm.
inputs.maskReference: Ready. Marked. Local only. Ready. Marked. Local only.
inputs.messageDraft: Please mark EXHIBIT-88 and keep the packet local.
inputs.protectedOutput: Ready. Marked. Local only. EXHIBIT-88 ready. Marked. Local only.

calibrationNotes: The mask can become a fingerprint when repeated too tightly.
Overfit should invite rotation, cooldown, or lowered claim posture rather than celebratory continuity.
